hero.headline: A calmer foundation for modern SaaS websites.
hero.subheadline: A focused Astro theme with clean sections, fast pages, and thoughtful defaults for product teams.

features.heading:
Everything you need,
nothing you don't.
features.subtitle: Ditch the bloat. Zenix gives you a powerful, composable foundation that scales from MVP to Enterprise.

items.title: Blazing Fast Astro Architecture
items.description: Built on Astro's islands architecture, Zenix ships zero JavaScript by default. Achieve perfect 100/100 Lighthouse scores without breaking a sweat, ensuring your visitors never wait.

items.title: Conversion Optimized
items.description: Designed using proven SaaS landing page heuristics. Every button, gradient, and layout choice is engineered to convert visitors.

items.title: Tailwind v4 Native
items.description: Built with the latest version of Tailwind CSS. Customize the entire theme's typography and color palette from a single config file.

items.title: Powerful MDX Content Engine
items.description: Write your blog posts and changelogs in Markdown or MDX. Render complex interactive components directly inside your written content with full Astro Content Collection type-safety.

testimonials.heading: Loved by Founders
testimonials.subtitle: Don't just take our word for it. See what others are building with Zenix.

faq.heading: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Zenix.

items.question: Do I need to know Astro to use Zenix?
items.answer: Basic knowledge of HTML and Tailwind CSS is helpful, but you don't need to be an Astro expert. The code is well-commented and structured to be intuitive even for beginners.

items.question: Can I use this for client projects?
items.answer: Yes. Zenix is released under the MIT license, so you can use it for personal, commercial, and client projects.

items.question: Does it work with standard Markdown?
items.answer: Yes, the blog supports both standard Markdown (.md) and MDX (.mdx) files, allowing you to embed interactive components directly in your posts.

items.question: How do I deploy it?
items.answer: Since it's built with Astro, you can deploy it anywhere that hosts static sites: Vercel, Netlify, Cloudflare Pages, GitHub Pages, or your own server.

items.question: Can I customize the design?
items.answer: Yes. Branding, navigation, social links, and common site settings live in src/config.ts, while sections and components can be edited directly.

cta.heading: Ready to launch your project?
cta.subtitle: Join hundreds of founders who are building faster with Zenix.
